title: hieracium bohatschianum subsp. bohatschianum
intro: Hieracium bohatschianum subsp. bohatschianum, also known as Bohatsch's Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. It is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and fight off infections. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects, providing potential health benefits such as improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and antioxidant protection. Hieracium bohatschianum subsp. bohatschianum is traditionally prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, which can be used topically or internally to support overall health and well-being.
